div.p: The official URL for this implementation guide is:

title.value: Colorectal Cancer Screening and Management (CRCSM) Clinical Decision Support (CDS) Implementation Guide

valueMarkdown.value: Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on HL7 Terminology
Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on the HL7 Extension Pack

description.value: Resources related to ScreeningEligible flow
Resources related to DecisionToScreen flow
Resources related to IncreasedRiskExclusions flow

This value set includes concepts for the presence of blood in stool. Includes concepts for signs of blood in stool, including melena and hematoschezia. Excludes concepts for Blood in stool due to inflammatory bowel disease, hematoma, or neonatal/perinatal.
Concepts for a colonoscopy procedure intended for routine screening purposes or follow-up after an abnormal stool test.
This ActivityDefinition generates a CommunicationRequest containing information about the patient's ineligibility for screening.
This ActivityDefinition generates a CommunicationRequest containing information about the patient's ineligibility for screening.
This ActivityDefinition generates a CommunicationRequest recommending to stop screening.

name.value: Communicate Shared Decision Making to Continue Screening

description.value: This ActivityDefinition generates a CommunicationRequest recommending shared decision making on the decision to continue screening.
Concepts identifying conditions indicative of Crohn's Disease
Concepts for computed tomographic (CT) colonography.
Decision to screen logic path.
Concepts for family history of colorectal cancer.

name.value: Family History of Potentially Precancerous Polyps

description.value: Concepts for family history of polyps of colon.
Concepts for a fecal immunochemical test.
Concepts for a flexible sigmoidoscopy.
Concepts for a fecal immunochemical test.

name.value: Hereditary Syndrome Associated with Colorectal Cancer

description.value: Includes concepts for hereditary syndromes associated with colorectal cancer
Concepts for colorectal cancer with specific context of past history.
Risk Factors logic path.

name.value: Non Bleeding Colorectal Cancer Signs and Symptoms

description.value: Concepts for non-bleeding signs and symptoms often associated with colorectal cancer. Includes diarrhea, constipation, tenesmus, abdominal pain or cramping, fatigue or weakness, unintended or unexplained weight loss, change in bowel habits or stool shape.
Code representing plan definition action codes
This value set includes action codes for Plan Definitions within this implementation guide.

name.value: Plan Definition Action Reason Code System

description.value: Code representing plan definition action reason codes
This value set includes action reason codes for Plan Definitions within this implementation guide.
Concepts for potentially precancerous polyps disorders or conditions.
Concepts for potentially precancerous polyp findings.
Primary Screening Decision pathway.
Screening eligible logic path.
This ActivityDefinition generates a Questionnaire Task containing a request to complete a questionnaire.
Code representing cancer screening related observations
Concepts for a stool DNA-FIT test.
Concepts identifying conditions indicative of ulcerative colitis.
